requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Oman overwhelmingly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP ~ 3), a hydrocarbon refrigerant classified A3 (lower flammability) under ISO 817. For the Omani market the refrigerant aspect is governed primarily through the safety standard: the GSO adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, including Annex AA, which sets the maximum R-600a charge per appliance/compartment configuration, ventilation requirements, and ignition-source provisions. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the appliance charge complies with the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability limits; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation; and (3) ensure markings and safety instructions (in Arabic) cover the flammable-refrigerant handling and servicing precautions. Oman, as a party to the Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment, phases down HFCs; R-600a is not an HFC and is well-positioned, but any HFC-based models (e.g., R-134a) should be checked against current GSO/Oman refrigerant provisions.
summary.zh: 在阿曼销售的家用电冰箱绝大多数使用R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3），一种依据ISO 817归类为A3（低可燃性）的碳氢化合物制冷剂。对于阿曼市场，制冷剂方面主要通过安全标准管控：GSO采纳的IEC 60335-2-24，包括附件AA，其规定了每种器具／隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风要求及点火源条款。制造商须：（1）核实器具充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在产品文件中声明制冷剂名称（R-600a／异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）确保标识和安全说明（阿拉伯语）涵盖可燃制冷剂的处理和维修注意事项。阿曼作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及《基加利修正案》缔约方，正在削减HFC；R-600a并非HFC且具备良好条件，但任何含HFC的型号（如R-134a）应对照当前GSO/阿曼制冷剂条款核查。
summary.zht: 在阿曼銷售的家用電冰箱絕大多數使用R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3），一種依據ISO 817歸類為A3（低可燃性）的碳氫化合物製冷劑。對於阿曼市場，製冷劑方面主要通過安全標準管控：GSO採納的IEC 60335-2-24，包括附件AA，其規定了每種器具／隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風要求及點火源條款。製造商須：（1）核實器具充注量符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在產品文件中聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a／異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）確保標識和安全說明（阿拉伯語）涵蓋可燃製冷劑的處理和維修注意事項。阿曼作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及《基加利修正案》締約方，正在削減HFC；R-600a並非HFC且具備良好條件，但任何含HFC的型號（如R-134a）應對照當前GSO/阿曼製冷劑條款核查。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements) — GSO adoption applied under the DGSM scheme
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down framework to which Oman is a party (relevant to HFC-based models, not R-600a)

summary.en: China regulates flammable-refrigerant charge for household appliances primarily through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements). China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because the Chinese GB 4706.13 R-600a provisions and the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA both derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical content is closely aligned — Chinese R-600a refrigerators are generally well-positioned for Oman on the refrigerant aspect, subject to charge and documentation verification.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 4706.13-2014管控家用器具的可燃制冷剂充注量，其纳入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风、点火源要求）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减计划，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国GB 4706.13的R-600a规定与GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术内容高度一致——使用R-600a的中国电冰箱在制冷剂方面对阿曼一般具备良好条件，但须核实充注量及文件。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 4706.13-2014管控家用器具的可燃製冷劑充注量，其納入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風、點火源要求）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減計畫，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國GB 4706.13的R-600a規定與GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術內容高度一致——使用R-600a的中國電冰箱在製冷劑方面對阿曼一般具備良好條件，但須核實充注量及文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is mainly documentation and charge verification, not a fundamental technology gap, because both GB 4706.13 and the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA share the IEC 60335-2-24 basis: (1) Omani product documentation must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams, with Arabic safety instructions for flammable-refrigerant handling. (2) The R-600a charge must be confirmed within the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits for the appliance configuration; a Chinese CCC test report should be checked to confirm it demonstrates Annex AA charge compliance at the configuration sold in Oman. (3) HFC models — any model in the export range using R-134a or another HFC should be assessed against current GSO/Oman refrigerant provisions and the Kigali phase-down before market entry. [NOTE: confirm the exact Annex AA charge limit and any Oman-specific refrigerant provisions against the current GSO/IEC text before regulatory submission.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距主要在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距，因为GB 4706.13与GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA同以IEC 60335-2-24为基础：（1）阿曼产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a／异丁烷）及充注量（克），并附阿拉伯语可燃制冷剂处理安全说明。（2）须确认R-600a充注量在该器具配置下符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值；应核查中国CCC检测报告，确认其在阿曼销售配置下证明符合附件AA充注量要求。（3）HFC型号——出口产品系列中任何使用R-134a或其他HFC的型号，在进入市场前应对照当前GSO/阿曼制冷剂条款及基加利削减计划进行评估。【注：在监管提交前，应针对当前GSO/IEC文本确认具体的附件AA充注量限值及任何阿曼专属制冷剂条款。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距主要在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距，因為GB 4706.13與GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA同以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎：（1）阿曼產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a／異丁烷）及充注量（克），並附阿拉伯語可燃製冷劑處理安全說明。（2）須確認R-600a充注量在該器具配置下符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值；應核查中國CCC檢測報告，確認其在阿曼銷售配置下證明符合附件AA充注量要求。（3）HFC型號——出口產品系列中任何使用R-134a或其他HFC的型號，在進入市場前應對照當前GSO/阿曼製冷劑條款及基加利削減計畫進行評估。【註：在監管提交前，應針對當前GSO/IEC文本確認具體的附件AA充注量限值及任何阿曼專屬製冷劑條款。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant provisions of GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA apply via the DGSM safety conformity route; HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment applies to HFC-based models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant for Oman-market household refrigerators and is well-positioned (not an HFC). The charge must be verified against GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits and the refrigerant type and charge weight documented, with Arabic safety instructions. Chinese GB 4706.13 R-600a provisions share the IEC basis, so the gap is mainly documentation/charge verification; any HFC-based models should be assessed against current GSO/Oman provisions and the Kigali phase-down.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是阿曼市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，具备良好条件（非HFC）。须核实充注量是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，并记录制冷剂类型及充注量，附阿拉伯语安全说明。中国GB 4706.13的R-600a规定同以IEC为基础，故差距主要在文件／充注量核实；任何含HFC的型号应对照当前GSO/阿曼条款及基加利削减计划评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是阿曼市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，具備良好條件（非HFC）。須核實充注量是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，並記錄製冷劑類型及充注量，附阿拉伯語安全說明。中國GB 4706.13的R-600a規定同以IEC為基礎，故差距主要在文件／充注量核實；任何含HFC的型號應對照當前GSO/阿曼條款及基加利削減計畫評估。
